items.title: A Look At Procter & Gamble (PG) Valuation After Mixed Q2 Results And High Profile Brand Campaigns
items.description: Procter & Gamble (PG) is back in focus after a mixed fiscal Q2 update, steady full year guidance, and high profile brand pushes, ranging from Old Spice's Spice Alchemist launch to Olympic and Super Bowl campaigns. See our latest analysis for Procter & Gamble. Those marketing pushes and steady guidance have coincided with improving momentum, with a 7 day share price return of 6.47% and a 30 day share price return of 11.75%, while the 1 year total shareholder return of a 4.64% decline contrasts...

items.title: Staples Stocks Are Stretched. One of the Market’s Hottest Sectors Looks Way Too Frothy.
items.description: Consumer staples stocks are soaring. Walmart, Costco, Coke and P&G may have fewer AI risks. But the stocks are now pricey.

items.title: Can Beauty & Personal Care Innovation Drive Procter & Gamble's Growth?
items.description: PG is leaning on faster Beauty and Personal Care innovation, premiumization and science-backed upgrades to drive pricing power and long-term growth.

items.title: Gillette Venus Announces Partnership with U.S. Figure Skating at the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, for Unbelievably Smooth Skin
items.description: BOSTON, February 04, 2026--With just two days until the Olympic Winter Games Milano Cortina 2026, Gillette Venus is proud to announce its partnership with leading U.S. Figure Skating athletes, Alysa Liu, Isabeau Levito, and Starr Andrews. As the Official Razor of Team USA and Milano Cortina 2026, Venus continues to champion women's excellence in sports, joining forces with these elite athletes. This partnership builds on Venus' recent collaborations with Olympic surfers and swimmers, as well as

items.title: Old Spice’s Most Sophisticated Cologne-Infused Scents Arrive Nationwide: Introducing the Spice Alchemist Collection
items.description: CINCINNATI, February 04, 2026--Old Spice continues to redefine men’s grooming with the Spice Alchemist collection, merging the artistry of a premium fine fragrance with cologne-infused scents and the brand’s legendary, high-performance odor protection. This lineup embodies premium fragrances with scents that are preferred versus a $300 cologne in blind consumer testing, but at a fraction of the cost. Yes, you can have it all.
